history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi! Welcome to McDonald's. What would you like to order today?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi! For around 1530 kcal, try a Big Mac (540 kcal) + 2 large fries (1,120 kcal) = 1,660 kcal. Another option: 1 Big Mac (540) + 1 chocolate shake (470) + 1 large fries (560) = 1,570 kcal. Let me know if you'd like to adjust!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Второй вариант — немного выше, но подойдет.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Perfect! Your order: 1 Big Mac, 1 chocolate shake, and 1 large fries (1,570 kcal). A bit higher than 1,530 but works well. Need anything else?
